chunks.text: Okay. Okay. Okay. I got to talk to my family because they want me back over Chinese New Year, which is two weeks before then. But let me figure it out.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Yeah.

chunks.speaker: Tiffany Huang
chunks.text: Either way, if I'm not take the place.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Thank you. That would be awesome. I would really appreciate it. Cool. I'll let you guys be.

chunks.speaker: Tiffany Huang
chunks.text: Okay. Thanks.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: All right, take care. Bye.
